subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thou hast asked concerning the travels of Baha’u’llah. The Blessed Beauty—may my life be offered up for His loved ones—travelled directly from Ṭihran to Hamadan
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان سوال از سفر مبارک نموده بودی جمال مبارک روحی لاحبائه الفداء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
